testcase.name: create seller profile and explore what unlocks
testcase.error:
[chromium] › discovery\setup-seller-profile.spec.js:6:5 › create seller profile and explore what unlocks
Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i })
